name: A cost of second life | TG TF
description:
You're terminally ill and close to your deathbed. Without knowing that your fate is about to change, you'll slowly getting better... but your life will never be the same again after the strange metamorphosis.

⏔⏔⏔ ꒰ ᧔ෆ᧓ ꒱ ⏔⏔⏔

˗ˏˋ ꒰ ＣＲＥＡＴＯＲ＇Ｓ ＮＯＴＥ ꒱ ˎˊ˗

Bot requested by @QuirkyUwU. I changed the bot concept a bit, but still keep the main idea core the same. This is a slow burn scenario that you get a cure with feminization / masculinization side effect.

You're slowly getting better and becoming the opposite sex at the same time (There are two intros for MTF and FTM). Your old self will still die eventually. You're alive... just in a different way.
creator: Milkylxtte
